data.body: AC amendment: Task must add .test-index entry: 'plugins/dso/scripts/recipe-adapters/rope-adapter.sh: tests/scripts/test-rope-adapter.sh' in .test-index at repo root. The pre-commit test gate requires this mapping to enforce test coverage on commits modifying rope-adapter.sh. Verify: grep -q 'rope-adapter.sh' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
